assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md (Step 8), line 69 shows '[mention: @psirt-analyst|557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id]' and lines 79-83 show the ADF representation: { "type": "mention", "attrs": { "id": "557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id", "text": "@psirt-analyst" } }. The ADF mention node is present with the correct account ID.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1), line 20 shows 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' — the reporter was extracted from the Jira issue's reporter field. The Step 8 mention in remediation.md uses this same account ID (557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id), confirming it was sourced from the Jira issue reporter field, not from any ProdSec configuration.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), line 27 shows '[mention: @ProdSec|557058:prodsec-mock-account-id]' and lines 39-41 show the ADF representation: { "type": "mention", "attrs": { "id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@ProdSec" } }. The ADF mention node is present with the correct account ID.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), the ProdSec @mention appears on line 27 ('[mention: @ProdSec|557058:prodsec-mock-account-id]') and the Comment Footnote appears on line 31 ('This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-security...'). The @mention precedes the footnote. The ADF representation section also confirms this ordering: the mention node is described before the Comment Footnote ADF block.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), line 27 contains '[mention: @ProdSec|557058:prodsec-mock-account-id]' and lines 39-41 contain the ADF mention node with id '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id'. This confirms the ProdSec account ID was successfully extracted from configuration and used in the Step 3 Affects Versions correction comment.
